name: web-quality
description: TypeScript/JavaScript quality hooks — auto-lint, type-check, and test runner with console.log and any-type warnings.

hooks.command: for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) d=$(dirname "$f"); while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$d/package.json" ]; do d=$(dirname "$d"); done; [ -f "$d/package.json" ] && { cd "$d" && npx eslint --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }; break;; esac; done

for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) d="$f"; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do d=$(dirname "$d"); [ -f "$d/tsconfig.json" ] && break; done; [ -f "$d/tsconfig.json" ] && { cd "$d" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || true; }; break;; esac; done

for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *__tests__*|*.test.*|*.spec.*) continue;; *.ts|*.tsx) for ext in test.ts test.tsx spec.ts spec.tsx; do d=$(dirname "$f"); b=$(basename "$f" | sed 's/\.[^.]*$//'); for td in "$d/__tests__" "$d"; do t="$td/$b.$ext"; [ -f "$t" ] && { root="$f"; while [ "$root" != "/" ]; do root=$(dirname "$root"); [ -f "$root/package.json" ] && break; done; cd "$root" && npx jest --no-coverage --bail "$t" 2>&1 | tail -10 || true; break 3; }; done; done; break;; esac; done
